{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Warehouse Manager Assistant",
  "description": "Bedmate Furniture, Nigeria&#39;s leading furniture company with a rich history spanning over two decades. Since our establishment in 2002, we have been dedicated to providing exceptional furniture solutions to homes, offices, and commercial spaces across the country.

As a socially responsible company, we strive to make a positive impact on our community and the environment. We adhere to sustainable practices, utilizing eco-friendly materials and minimizing waste in our production processes. Additionally, we actively engage in philanthropic initiatives, supporting local charities and organizations that promote education, healthcare, and social welfare.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Warehouse Manager Assistant

Job Location: Gwarimpa, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Warehouse Assistant is responsible for supporting daily warehouse operations, including receiving, storing, handling, and dispatching furniture products.
	The role requires attention to detail, physical strength, and a commitment to maintaining an organized and efficient warehouse environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Assist in receiving, inspecting, and documenting incoming furniture items and materials.
	Arrange and store furniture in designated warehouse areas following proper stacking and safety procedures.
	Pick, pack, and prepare customer orders for delivery or pickup.
	Ensure all items are handled carefully to prevent damage, especially delicate or premium furniture pieces.
	Maintain cleanliness and organization of the warehouse at all times.
	Conduct routine stock counts and assist in inventory management.
	Report any damaged, missing, or faulty items to the supervisor promptly.
	Assist in assembling or disassembling furniture when required.
	Follow all health and safety guidelines, including proper lifting techniques and use of equipment.
	Support delivery teams when necessary.


Requirements


	Minimum OND or equivalent qualification.
	Previous warehouse or logistics experience (preferably in furniture or similar industry) is an added advantage.
	Physically fit and capable of lifting heavy items.
	Basic understanding of inventory and stock control processes.
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment.
	Good communication and teamwork skills.
	Attention to detail and organizational ability.


Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Time management and reliability
	Strong work ethic and integrity
	Ability to follow instructions accurately
	Problem-solving mindset
	Basic record-keeping skills
	MS operating systems.


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their cover letter and cv in one document to: recruitment.bedmateabuja@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Warehouse Manager Assistant Job at Bedmate Furniture Nigeria




        
    

        
        Bedmate Furniture, Nigeria's leading furniture company with a rich history spanning over two decades. Since our establishment in 2002, we have been dedicated to providing exceptional furniture solutions to homes, offices, and commercial spaces across the country.

As a socially responsible company, we strive to make a positive impact on our community and the environment. We adhere to sustainable practices, utilizing eco-friendly materials and minimizing waste in our production processes. Additionally, we actively engage in philanthropic initiatives, supporting local charities and organizations that promote education, healthcare, and social welfare.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:
     

            
    



Job Position: Warehouse Manager Assistant

Job Location: Gwarimpa, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Warehouse Assistant is responsible for supporting daily warehouse operations, including receiving, storing, handling, and dispatching furniture products.
	The role requires attention to detail, physical strength, and a commitment to maintaining an organized and efficient warehouse environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Assist in receiving, inspecting, and documenting incoming furniture items and materials.
	Arrange and store furniture in designated warehouse areas following proper stacking and safety procedures.
	Pick, pack, and prepare customer orders for delivery or pickup.
	Ensure all items are handled carefully to prevent damage, especially delicate or premium furniture pieces.
	Maintain cleanliness and organization of the warehouse at all times.
	Conduct routine stock counts and assist in inventory management.
	Report any damaged, missing, or faulty items to the supervisor promptly.
	Assist in assembling or disassembling furniture when required.
	Follow all health and safety guidelines, including proper lifting techniques and use of equipment.
	Support delivery teams when necessary.


Requirements


	Minimum OND or equivalent qualification.
	Previous warehouse or logistics experience (preferably in furniture or similar industry) is an added advantage.
	Physically fit and capable of lifting heavy items.
	Basic understanding of inventory and stock control processes.
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment.
	Good communication and teamwork skills.
	Attention to detail and organizational ability.


Skills & Competencies:


	Time management and reliability
	Strong work ethic and integrity
	Ability to follow instructions accurately
	Problem-solving mindset
	Basic record-keeping skills
	MS operating systems.


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their cover letter and cv in one document to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at Runlink
content:
Runlink is a global tech brand powering business growth across EMEA (Europe, Middle East & Africa). We specialize in premium, durable data cables and mobile accessories, designed to meet the unique needs of mobile repair shops and wholesalers worldwide. With strategic hubs in Shenzhen, Dubai, and Lagos, Nigeria, we combine global supply chain excellence with local market expertise. Our trusted banking and logistics network in Nigeria ensures seamless operations, while our EMEA-wide vision positions us as a leader in the industry. We don’t just sell cables—we empower your success. We grow only when you grow. Join our Lagos team to lead Runlink’s expansion across Africa!

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:
     

            
    



1.) Senior Sales Manager (B2B Sales Team Lead)

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Exclusive leadership opportunity with an established international cross-border financial services company.
	You will lead, coach and manage a local B2B sales team of 5-10 members, and drive corporate client growth in Nigeria’s foreign trade sector.


Ideal Candidate


	Min 2+ years of sales management experience, led teams of 5+
	Fintech, cross-border service or B2B sales background preferred
	Strong leadership, result-oriented and pressure-resistant.


What We Offer


	Uncapped team commission, fast promotion, professional management training.


Application Closing Date: 15th July, 2026.

Click here to apply online

Note


	Upload your resume
	PRO TIP : When you upload, choose 'Sarah' as your consultant, that flags your profile for my personal review, so you aren't just lost in the algorithm.


 

2.) HR Officer

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full Time

Job Summary


	This is strictly an ON-SITE role in Ikeja, Lagos.
	Remote applications will not be considered.
	Runlink is a mature Chinese enterprise with long-term business development experience in Nigeria.
	We started from mobile accessories, data cables and LCD screen wholesale business, and now expand into mid-to-high end talent service and headhunting recruitment for Chinese enterprises operating in Nigeria.
	We have deep local market insight, stable local channel resources and standardized company operation system.


Job Responsibilities


	Manage daily HR routine work, staff attendance and employee profile files
	Complete full cycle recruitment, resume screening, interview arrangement and employee onboarding
	Assist and prepare for headhunting and high-end talent sourcing business
	Collect local candidate resources and build up company talent pool
	Follow up mid and senior level candidates and maintain long-term talent connection
	Cooperate with talent background check and recruitment arrangement
	Keep all company business and talent information strictly confidential


Job Requirements


	1-3 years of working experience in Nigeria local HR field
	Candidates with headhunting or talent sourcing experience are highly preferred
	Candidate who can speak both English and Chinese language is highly preferred
	Familiar with Lagos local job market and recruitment channels
	Honest, careful, reliable, strong communication and execution skills
	Full time on site, strictly follow company rules and red line policy.


Salary
N160,000 - N260,000 monthly.

Application Closing Date: 3rd August, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only shortlisted qualified candidates will be contacted.

 

3.) Business Development & Sales Executive 

Job Location: Lagos (Hybrid)
Employment Type: Full-time

Your role


	Offline platform promotion & new client development.


Requirements


	Honest, reliable, and punctual (must-have)
	3+ years of BD or sales experience
	HND / OND / Bachelor’s Degree accepted
	Basic Chinese culture awareness (Mandarin speaker is a plus)
	We’re not just looking for experience — we’re looking for character first.
	Honesty, punctuality, and responsibility are non-negotiable for us.


Package
Basic salary + Unlimited high commission

Application Closing Date: 5th July, 2026. 

Click here to apply online

Note


	If you’re driven, accountable, and ready to earn what you deserve, apply now!
	Upload your resume, and let our AI instantly find the best matches for you.
	PRO Tip: When you upload, choose 'Sarah' as your consultant, that flags your profile for my personal review, so you aren't just lost in the algorithm.


     

    

        Click here to Apply

Job Position: Accountant (Female)

Job Location: Bashiru Street, Ojodu, Lagos

	We ares seeking a young, energetic Female Accountant to join our growing team.


Role Requirements


	0&ndash;2 years of relevant work experience
	Fresh or recently qualified accountant (OND/HND/BSc in Accounting or related field)
	Proficiency in basic accounting software, MS Excel, and financial record-keeping
	Strong attention to detail and integrity
	Proximity/Residence in Ojodu axis is an added advantage.


Who We&rsquo;re Looking For:


	A competent, smart, and personable young female professional with a positive attitude, eagerness to learn, and passion for contributing to a fast-paced startup environment in the renewable energy sector.

Note


	For more inquiries, WhatsApp: 07075461890
	Join us in powering a sustainable future!
	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Accountant (Female) Job at RNew Energies Limited




        
    

        
        RNew Energies Limited is a dynamic startup company specializing in renewable energy consultancy, sales, and services. Our focus is on innovative energy storage solutions, including tubular batteries, lithium batteries, and e-mobility vehicles.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant (Female)

Job Location: Bashiru Street, Ojodu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We ares seeking a young, energetic Female Accountant to join our growing team.


Role Requirements
     

            
    




	0–2 years of relevant work experience
	Fresh or recently qualified accountant (OND/HND/BSc in Accounting or related field)
	Proficiency in basic accounting software, MS Excel, and financial record-keeping
	Strong attention to detail and integrity
	Proximity/Residence in Ojodu axis is an added advantage.


Who We’re Looking For:


	A competent, smart, and personable young female professional with a positive attitude, eagerness to learn, and passion for contributing to a fast-paced startup environment in the renewable energy sector.


Salary
N100,000 and above (depending on experience)

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a brief cover note to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note


	For more inquiries, WhatsApp: 07075461890
	Join us in powering a sustainable future!
	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

HR Assistant Job at Septagus consulting Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Septagus consulting Nigeria Limited is principally an outsourcing and recruitment enterprise, known for her exceptionalservicedelivery.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Assistant

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Recruitment support. Post job ads on job boards and social media platforms.
	Onboarding. Ensure the preboarding process goes smoothly.
	Record-keeping. 
	Benefits administration. 
	Compliance.
	Performance management.
	Employee relations.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an HND / Bachelor's Degree with at least 3 years of experience.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
